narrative: RBNZ Governor Breman signals further rate hikes as inflationary pressures build, driving NZD/CAD to a 0.81% G8 bilateral spread; NZD leads G8 (+0.39%) while CAD lags (-0.42%) on oil price volatility. Fed officials flag crude risks and June policy flexibility, supporting USD/JPY at 159.57 as the 290bp OIS carry remains intact; gold lower -1.10%; equities +0.02%; DXY +0.15%; VIX 16.3. Watch RBNZ meeting today for further hawkish guidance.
